old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.3","title":"Add valid cross-language signed frame oracle","description":"Review of 2auf.35 found no canonical cryptographically valid signed frame. Existing signed examples use arbitrary or zero MIC bytes, and each implementation otherwise signs/verifies itself. Add a fixed frame-specific vector with seed/public key, exact signing preimage, deterministic Schnorr-48 signature, and complete wire bytes, cross-validated by independent C/Python/Rust implementations.","acceptance_criteria":"A fixed valid signed-frame vector records key material, exact preimage, signature, and wire bytes; C/Python/Rust independently reproduce or verify it byte-for-byte; tampered LENGTH, LLSec, destination, payload, and signature reject; vector provenance is documented; three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:13.667971Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:13.667971Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:13.823689Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.3","title":"Add valid cross-language signed frame oracle","description":"Review of 2auf.35 found no canonical cryptographically valid signed frame. Existing signed examples use arbitrary or zero MIC bytes, and each implementation otherwise signs/verifies itself. Add a fixed frame-specific vector with seed/public key, exact signing preimage, deterministic Schnorr-48 signature, and complete wire bytes, cross-validated by independent C/Python/Rust implementations.","acceptance_criteria":"A fixed valid signed-frame vector records key material, exact preimage, signature, and wire bytes; C/Python/Rust independently reproduce or verify it byte-for-byte; tampered LENGTH, LLSec, destination, payload, and signature reject; vector provenance is documented; three reviews pass.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:13.667971Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T02:19:03.364661Z","started_at":"2026-07-17T02:19:03.364661Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-17T02:24:03.364661Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-17T02:19:03.364661Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:13.823689Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Added signed_plaintext_oracle with fixed seed/private/public key, exact LENGTH||LLSec||EPO||SEQ||DST||PLD preimage, deterministic Schnorr-48 signature, and complete wire bytes. Python, Rust, and C independently reproduce keys/signature/wire and reject mutations to length, LLSec, epoch, sequence, destination, payload, and signature. Schema enforces state/length constraints. CI runs Python vectors, Rust no-default/all-features, and fail-closed C frame/Schnorr CTest. Gates: Python 131; Rust 68 unit + 2 vector + 1 doc; C frame and Schnorr CTest 1/1 each. Final three reviews: no findings."}
Valid signed-frame oracle independently reproduced and CI-gated
